auth.errorMsg: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

public.searchPlaceholder: Search artists, shows, and sports events
public.emptyDescription: Try another keyword, city, or category. We are continuously aggregating more events.
public.errorDescription: The content is temporarily unavailable. Please refresh and try again later.

home.selectedTitle: Reserved space for 3 featured homepage activities
home.selectedDescription: These three blocks use local mock images and content first so the alternating Figma structure is fixed before real activity data is wired in.

masters.title: Masters Collection
masters.subtitle: Immersive art showcases with a city-scale cultural atmosphere
masters.description: The first hero slide leans into exhibition energy, using a refined visual tone to match the Figma homepage rhythm and frame premium cultural content.

stadium.title: Live Stadium
stadium.subtitle: Hit tours and a sea of lights ready for the night
stadium.description: The second slide shifts into a high-contrast concert scene, highlighting popular live tours and crowd-driven energy to strengthen the homepage hero flow.

sports.title: Match Pulse
sports.subtitle: Headline fixtures with a rising home-city atmosphere
sports.description: The third slide focuses on sports, keeping the motion-heavy framing and clear CTA so the hero area stays consistent across every activity category.

home.mapHint: Hover for detail, click to drill down
home.mapError: The map resources could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.

selectedConcert.title: Selected Activity 01 · Immersive concert under the beam field
selectedConcert.summary: A large-scale stage experience with synchronized audience atmosphere, used here as fixed mock content to lock the first featured slot structure, image ratio, and text density.

selectedSports.title: Selected Activity 02 · Championship night home showdown
selectedSports.summary: The second alternating featured block preserves the Figma layout while emphasizing match information, schedule, and CTA space for future real sports data.

selectedExhibition.title: Selected Activity 03 · Night exhibition with curated special units
selectedExhibition.summary: The third featured block also uses fixed mock imagery and copy so the homepage keeps its full visual rhythm before the real recommendation feed is connected.

activities.keywordPlaceholder: Search by event name or keyword

activityDetail.loadError: Unable to load activity details. Please try again later.
activityDetail.notFound: Activity details are not available. It may be offline or removed.

notifications.subtitle: Review enrollment updates, payment reminders, and activity alerts in one place.

footer.brandDescription: A unified layer for shows, sports, exhibitions, and city experiences so users can find the next live event faster.
footer.serviceCoverage: Public discovery, search, recommendations, and notification reminders
footer.contactDescription: If you want to onboard more ticketing sources, merchant events, or collaboration data, reach out to the team below.

merchant.empty: No activities yet. Create your first one.
